description_long: This object is a wristwatch featuring a round, dark-colored case and a simple, minimalist dial. The watch is equipped with a blue strap that appears to be made of a flexible material, likely silicone or rubber, and is attached to the case with standard lugs. The dial is uncluttered, with no visible numerals or indices, and the hands are dark, blending into the face for a sleek, understated look. The case is relatively thin, and the strap is of uniform width, giving the watch a modern and streamlined appearance. There are no visible decorative elements, subdials, or complications on the face, emphasizing a clean and functional design. The clasp mechanism is not visible in the provided views.
description: A minimalist wristwatch with a round dark case and a blue silicone or rubber strap, featuring a simple, unmarked dial and a modern, streamlined design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round dark dial and the full length of the blue strap.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the thinness of the case and the strap's slim profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the case and the blue strap, with no visible markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the slim case and strap.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is minimalist with a solid dark color, lacking numerals, indices, or decorative elements. The hands are simple and dark, blending into the dial for a clean, modern look. No subdials, textures, or patterns are present.
attribute_strap_type: Straight blue silicone or rubber strap with a smooth finish and standard attachment to the case.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with two or three dark hands and no visible markers, complications, or special features.
